title: Hermes
description: Open-source document management system from HashiCorp Labs for scaling an organization's writing, review and approval workflows.
installation: Hermes is an alpha-stage HashiCorp Labs project that does NOT publish a prebuilt container image; you must build it from the repo (`docker build -t ghcr.io/hashicorp-forge/hermes:latest .`) and push it to a registry you control before deploying this template (update image.repository/tag to match). Hermes is config-driven via an HCL file: mount your `config.hcl` at the path referenced by the entrypoint (this template mounts a volume at /hermes/config; pass `-config=/hermes/config/config.hcl`) or override the database via the HERMES_SERVER_POSTGRES_* env vars set here. A Postgres add-on is provisioned and is the v2 source of truth - rotate the default `hermes` password. REQUIRED external companions NOT provided by this template: (1) Algolia (App ID + Search API Key + Write API Key) for the search index; (2) a Google Workspace project OR SharePoint/Microsoft 365 tenant as the document storage backend AND OAuth identity provider - supply the corresponding OAuth client credentials in config.hcl. Optional: Jira for issue linking. After first boot, run the included DB migrations and index sync per the repo README, then sign in with your Google/Microsoft account to bootstrap the first user.
